zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dennys於1421年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Gilbert Denys62歲，母親Margaret Russell35歲。他於1450年之前與Joan St Aubyn在英國結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年9月1日在英國英格蘭戴文邦藍 布魯爾享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dennys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Dennys was born in 1421, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Denys, was 62 and his mother, Margaret Russell, was 35. He married Joan St Aubyn before 1450, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 1 September 1503, in Buckland Brewer, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Dennys est né en 1421, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Denys, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Margaret Russell, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan St Aubyn avant 1450, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1503, à Buckland Brewer, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Dennys 1421 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Denys 62 und seine Mutter Margaret Russell 35. Er hat vor 1450 in England Joan St Aubyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1503 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Buckland Brewer, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: William Dennys(이)가 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Denys(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Russell(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1450년 이전 영국에서 Joan St Aubyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 벅랜드 브레어에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Dennys nasceu em 1421, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert Denys, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Russell, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan St Aubyn antes 1450, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1503, em Buckland Brewer, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Dennys родился в 1421 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert Denys было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Russell, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan St Aubyn перед 1450 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 1 сентября 1503 г. в местности буккланд брюир, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
